---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenGen
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

**Proposed solution**
How should this feature work? Be as specific as possible.

**Alternatives considered**
Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one better?

**Which component does this affect?**
- [ ] Pipeline (agents, refinement loop)
- [ ] Knowledge graph
- [ ] Verification system
- [ ] API
- [ ] Worker program
- [ ] Web platform (opengen.live)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Any other information, mockups, or examples.
